title: Bounded Fable 5 pilot (8 tasks/30 days, advisory-only) -- not permanent reinstatement

verifier.note: Mechanical checks only. Not independent Griff review, t1-approved, or a pm-verdict/v1 owner artifact.

runtime_proof.note: Docs/governance-only diff -- no runtime, workflow, or hook behavior changed by this lane.
